Has only one followed internal linking URL
Category: Links
The URL has only one followed incoming link from one other URL on the website. The amount of internal backlinks and their anchors have impact on page rankings. More internal backlinks means higher rankings, so it is better to add more links from other internal pages to pages listed in this filter.
